description_long: This is a dark wooden shelving unit with three horizontal slatted shelves supported by two angled side frames. The structure is open on all sides, allowing for easy access to the shelves from the front and sides. The slatted design of the shelves provides ventilation and a lightweight appearance, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or garages. The wood appears to be stained in a deep brown or espresso color, giving it a modern and sturdy look. There are no visible doors, drawers, or handles, emphasizing its open storage function. The overall build suggests it is freestanding and can be easily relocated as needed.
description: A dark wooden, open-slat shelving unit with three shelves and angled side supports, designed for accessible storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three evenly spaced slatted shelves and the angled side supports.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile and the slatted design of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the open structure and shelf arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the slatted shelves and the open, narrow profile.
